description: Defines and exports canonical readiness state primitives used across the platform. Readiness states classify whether an artifact, module, or workflow step is ready to advance through a lifecycle gate. This is the single authoritative source for readiness primitives.
forbidden_responsibilities: Artifact model schemas — those are owned by shared.artifact_models
Lineage records — those are owned by shared.lineage
Provenance records — those are owned by shared.provenance
Evaluation result logic — that belongs to control_plane.evaluation
Any domain-specific readiness criteria — those belong to the relevant domain_module or workflow_module
